overview.description: The T-REX 2X Long DJT Daily Target ETF (DJTU) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in communication services equity. The fund aims to provide 2x leveraged exposure to the daily price movement of Trump Media & Technology Group Corp. stock (NASDAQ: DJT), less fees and expenses. DJTU was launched on Feb 28, 2025 and is issued by Tuttle Capital Management.
